description_long: This is a single-seat couch or armchair with a broad, slightly curved backrest and wide, rounded armrests. The upholstery is a deep reddish-brown color, adorned with a subtle geometric pattern featuring squares, triangles, and abstract motifs in a slightly darker shade. The seat and back cushions are integrated into the frame, giving the couch a seamless, monolithic appearance. The legs are short and mostly hidden, making the base appear close to the ground. The surface finish is smooth with a slight sheen, suggesting a synthetic or treated fabric. The overall design is robust and comfortable, suitable for public waiting areas, lobbies, or urban parks.
description: A deep reddish-brown, patterned armchair with wide, rounded armrests and a seamless, integrated cushion design. The couch has a smooth, slightly glossy finish and a sturdy, low-profile base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, rounded armrest and the continuous, slightly reclined backrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, broad armrests, and the integrated back and seat cushions.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and backrest design seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full width and gentle curve of the backrest, with the patterned upholstery clearly visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, integrated seat and back cushions with no visible separation or accent pillows; cushions are attached and flush with the frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery features a subtle geometric pattern with squares, triangles, and abstract motifs in a slightly darker tone on a reddish-brown background.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are short, block-style, and mostly hidden beneath the base, likely made of wood or plastic with no decorative features.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are wide, rounded, and extend from the seat to the backrest at a consistent height, fully upholstered in the same patterned fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is high, continuous, and integrated with the seat, slightly curved for comfort, and fully upholstered with no visible tufting or division.
